StepAction: Idle; provider awaiting next request from opencode runtime
Build headers: emit session_id (sessionId) AND thread_id (threadId default sessionId); set x-client-request-id from threadId (DD-1, DD-2, INV-1, INV-2)
Build request body: prompt_cache_key sources from threadId (== sessionId by default); custom override preserved (INV-3)
WS send wrapped with promise + WS_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS race (DD-3, INV-4)
Send callback resolved before timeout: enter receive-loop (existing flow); on success wsErrorReason=null and stream completes
Timer fires before send callback: wsObs.wsErrorReason := 'ws_send_timeout'; abort ws; endStream
Empty-turn classifier reads wsErrorReason snapshot; ws_send_timeout maps to category=transient with retry recovery (INV-5)
